title: Altria Faces New Antitrust Classes As Juul Ties Revisit Valuation
summary: A federal court has certified multiple consumer antitrust class actions against Altria Group and Juul Labs related to Juul pod pricing in the e vapor market. The lawsuit alleges the companies conspired to restrain competition and raise prices for Juul pods across broad consumer groups. Class certification increases legal exposure for Altria Group, with many states and consumer populations now included.
